load-pdf-retrieve-xmp-metadata.title: Load PDF and Retrieve XMP Metadata
load-pdf-retrieve-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file to a PdfXmpMetadata facade and extract its XMP metadata as XML bytes.

create-xmp-metadata-pdf.title: Create XMP Metadata and Attach to New PDF
create-xmp-metadata-pdf.description: Shows how to generate a new PDF, build an XMP metadata block from scratch, add Dublin Core properties, and save the PDF with the metadata attached.

detect-modify-xmp-metadata-pdf.title: Detect and Modify XMP Metadata in PDF
detect-modify-xmp-metadata-pdf.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF via stream, checking for existing XMP metadata, optionally updating a property, and saving the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-baseurl-in-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Set BaseURL in PDF XMP Metadata
set-baseurl-in-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to bind a PDF file, add the xmp:BaseURL property to its XMP metadata, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-creator-tool-xmp-metadata.title: Set CreatorTool in PDF XMP Metadata
set-creator-tool-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to obtain the current application version and write it to the XMP CreatorTool property of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-xmp-nickname-property.title: Set XMP Nickname Property in PDF
set-xmp-nickname-property.description: Shows how to create a PDF in memory and assign a custom value to the xmp:Nickname metadata field using Aspose.Pdf's XMP metadata facade.

remove-nickname-from-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Remove Nickname Element from PDF XMP Metadata
remove-nickname-from-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, remove the Nickname element from its XMP metadata, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF
extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfXmpMetadata, retrieve its raw XMP XML as a UTF‑8 string, and optionally save it to a file.

read-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Read XMP Metadata from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
read-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfXmpMetadata, retrieve its XMP packet, and parse the XML to extract properties such as creator and creation date.

modify-xmp-metadata-in-pdf.title: Modify XMP Metadata in PDF using Aspose.Pdf
modify-xmp-metadata-in-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, extract its XMP metadata as XML, change a property (e.g., dc:creator) and write the updated metadata back to the PDF.

save-pdf-after-updating-xmp-metadata.title: Save PDF After Updating XMP Metadata
save-pdf-after-updating-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, add or update XMP metadata properties, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

insert-pages-update-xmp-metadata.title: Insert Pages and Update XMP Metadata in PDF
insert-pages-update-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to insert selected pages from one PDF into another and then add or update XMP metadata before saving the final document.

preserve-xmp-metadata-when-splitting-pdf.title: Preserve XMP Metadata When Splitting PDF into Single Pages
preserve-xmp-metadata-when-splitting-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to extract XMP metadata from a source PDF, split the document into individual page PDFs, and re‑apply the original metadata to each split file using Aspose.Pdf.

copy-xmp-metadata-and-merge-pdfs.title: Copy XMP Metadata Between PDFs and Merge
copy-xmp-metadata-and-merge-pdfs.description: Shows how to extract XMP metadata from a source PDF, apply it to a target PDF, and then concatenate the PDFs into a single document using Aspose.Pdf.

export-xmp-metadata-to-sidecar.title: Export XMP Metadata from PDF to Side‑car File
export-xmp-metadata-to-sidecar.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF document, retrieve its full XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and save the metadata to a separate .xmp side‑car file.

replace-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Replace PDF XMP Metadata from External File
replace-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to load a PDF, replace its existing XMP metadata with an external .xmp file, and save the updated document using the PdfFileInfo facade with a fallback to direct save.

validate-xmp-metadata-against-xsd.title: Validate XMP Metadata in PDF against XSD Schema
validate-xmp-metadata-against-xsd.description: Extracts XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and validates it against an XSD schema, logging any validation warnings or errors.

log-warning-existing-xmp-properties.title: Log Warning When Updating Existing XMP Metadata
log-warning-existing-xmp-properties.description: Demonstrates how to add XMP metadata to a PDF only if the property is empty, logging a warning when the property already contains a non‑empty value.

log-xmp-metadata-size-before-after-modif.title: Log XMP Metadata Size Before and After Modification
log-xmp-metadata-size-before-after-modif.description: Demonstrates how to read, modify, and log the size of XMP metadata in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's XMP facade, then save the updated document.

log-original-xmp-metadata.title: Log Original XMP Metadata from PDF
log-original-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to extract the original XMP XML from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfXmpMetadata facade and save it for audit trails.

add-creator-metadata-to-pdf-document.title: Add Creator Metadata to PDF Document
add-creator-metadata-to-pdf-document.description: Shows how to set the Creator metadata field of an Aspose.Pdf Document using the PdfFileInfo facade via a reusable extension method.

clear-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Clear XMP Metadata from PDF
clear-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove all XMP metadata fields from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, keeping only the required PDF schema header.

remove-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Remove XMP Metadata from PDF
remove-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete the entire XMP metadata block from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save the resulting metadata‑free file.

handle-encrypted-pdf-bindpdf-decrypt.title: Handle Encrypted PDF with BindPdf and Decrypt
handle-encrypted-pdf-bindpdf-decrypt.description: Demonstrates catching InvalidPasswordException when binding an encrypted PDF, decrypting it with a password using PdfFileSecurity, and then extracting text with PdfExtractor.

update-pdf-creator-metadata-reencrypt.title: Update PDF Creator Metadata and Re‑Encrypt
update-pdf-creator-metadata-reencrypt.description: Demonstrates opening a password‑protected PDF with the owner password, removing its encryption, updating the Creator metadata, and then re‑applying encryption with new passwords and permissions.

write-verify-custom-xmp-metadata-pdf.title: Write and Verify Custom XMP Metadata in PDF
write-verify-custom-xmp-metadata-pdf.description: Demonstrates adding custom XMP metadata fields (BaseUrl, CreatorTool, Nickname) to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and reading them back to confirm the values.

store-retrieve-unicode-nicknames.title: Store and Retrieve Unicode Nicknames in PDF Annotations
store-retrieve-unicode-nicknames.description: Demonstrates adding a TextAnnotation with Unicode characters (e.g., Chinese text, emoji) to a PDF and extracting the annotation text using PdfExtractor to verify correct storage.

verify-basepath-escaping.title: Verify BasePath Escaping in XfaParserOptions
verify-basepath-escaping.description: Shows a unit test that confirms the BasePath property of XfaParserOptions automatically escapes spaces and non‑ASCII characters in a URL.

benchmark-xmp-metadata-extraction.title: Benchmark XMP Metadata Extraction from Large PDF
benchmark-xmp-metadata-extraction.description: Shows how to bind a large PDF file and retrieve its XMP metadata while measuring the extraction time using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

update-pdf-creatortool-metadata.title: Update PDF CreatorTool Metadata in a Folder
update-pdf-creatortool-metadata.description: Shows how to batch‑process PDFs in a directory and set the Creator metadata property using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo.

update-xmp-property-in-pdf.title: Update XMP Property in PDF
update-xmp-property-in-pdf.description: Shows how to add or modify an XMP metadata property in a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

bind-pdf-byte-array-to-pdfxmpmetadata.title: Bind PDF Byte Array to PdfXmpMetadata and Extract XMP
bind-pdf-byte-array-to-pdfxmpmetadata.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF in memory, bind its byte array to the PdfXmpMetadata facade, and retrieve the embedded XMP metadata as a byte array.

update-xmp-baseurl-from-request.title: Update XMP BaseURL in PDF Using Request Host
update-xmp-baseurl-from-request.description: Demonstrates building a base URL from the current request and embedding it into a PDF's XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf's XMP classes.

read-xmp-metadata-from-pdf-unc.title: Read XMP Metadata from PDF via UNC Path
read-xmp-metadata-from-pdf-unc.description: Shows how to bind a PDF located on a network share using a UNC path and extract its XMP metadata, including the full XML and a specific property, with Aspose.Pdf.

list-xmp-namespaces-in-pdf.title: List XMP Namespaces in a PDF
list-xmp-namespaces-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfXmpMetadata, extract all XMP property keys, derive their namespace prefixes, and display each prefix with its corresponding namespace URI.

add-minimal-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Minimal XMP Metadata to PDF When Missing
add-minimal-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.description: Shows how to detect the absence of XMP metadata in a PDF and create a minimal XMP packet using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfXmpMetadata before saving the document.

export-pdf-xmp-metadata-to-json.title: Export PDF XMP Metadata to JSON
export-pdf-xmp-metadata-to-json.description: Shows how to extract XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and serialize it as a JSON file for integration with non‑XML systems.

compress-pdf-read-xmp-metadata.title: Compress PDF and Read XMP Metadata
compress-pdf-read-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to apply high‑level compression to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf optimization options, then retrieve the XMP metadata from the compressed file via the Facades API.

validate-mandatory-xmp-fields.title: Validate Mandatory XMP Fields Before PDF Publication
validate-mandatory-xmp-fields.description: Loads a PDF, binds it to the XMP metadata facade, checks for required XMP fields, and saves the document only when all mandatory fields are present.

add-timestamp-to-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Add Timestamp to PDF XMP Metadata
add-timestamp-to-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to create a PDF, bind XMP metadata, add a custom ISO‑8601 timestamp property, and save the document with the updated metadata.

extract-pdf-xmp-metadata-to-dictionary.title: Extract PDF XMP Metadata to Dictionary
extract-pdf-xmp-metadata-to-dictionary.description: Demonstrates how to read XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and convert the key/value pairs into a simple dictionary for easy consumption.

set-default-creator-tool-metadata.title: Set Default Creator Tool Metadata in PDF
set-default-creator-tool-metadata.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, assign a default Creator metadata value when none is supplied, and save the updated document.

disable-baseurl-injection-html-to-pdf.title: Disable BaseUrl Injection for HTML to PDF Conversion in Test Environments
disable-baseurl-injection-html-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a configuration switch that disables BaseUrl injection when converting HTML to PDF in test environments, using Aspose.Pdf's HtmlLoadOptions and Document classes.

refresh-creator-tool-metadata-nightly.title: Refresh CreatorTool Metadata for All PDFs Nightly
refresh-creator-tool-metadata-nightly.description: Shows how to walk through a PDF repository, update the Creator metadata field for each document, and save the changes, making it suitable for a scheduled nightly job.

update-multiple-xmp-properties-atomicall.title: Update Multiple XMP Properties in a PDF Atomically
update-multiple-xmp-properties-atomicall.description: Demonstrates how to register an XMP namespace and set several XMP metadata properties in a single transaction, then save the PDF to avoid partial writes.
